reference: I have been having pain in my right side below my rib cage on and off for a couple of months now. Last week it was really bad. I was told last year that I had a small cyst on my liver. I went to my gastroenterologist a couple of months ago, and he did an ultrasound and said he couldn't see anything.
text: I have been having pain in my right side below my ribcage, on and off for a couple of months now. Last week it was really bad. I was told last year that I had a small cyst on my liver. I went to my gastroenterologist a couple of months ago, and he did an ultrasound and said he couldn't see anything.
